title: Add Mermaid diagram for static vs dynamic dispatch
description: ferrum-introduction-to-traits.md explains that generic fn with [T: Trait] monomorphizes into separate copies per type at compile time, while dyn Trait uses a single function with a vtable at runtime. This is a critical design tradeoff. A side-by-side diagram showing the code-generation difference (one fn → N specialized copies vs one fn + vtable pointer) would make the tradeoff immediately visible.
